tasks.name: Create a 5-article beginner mindfulness reading list with 5–10 minute articles from the last 12 months
tasks.description: Build a reading list named 'Week 1 Mindfulness' that contains exactly 5 articles tagged 'Mindfulness Basics', each with a reading time between 5–10 minutes and published within the last 12 months.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Articles' option in the main navigation menu at the top of the page.
In the sidebar filters, click the 'Topics' section and select the 'Mindfulness Basics' checkbox.
In the 'Reading Time' filter, set the minimum value to 5 minutes and the maximum value to 10 minutes using the slider or input fields.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the article list and select 'Newest First' to prioritize recent articles.
From the filtered list, click the title of the first article that shows a publication date within the last 12 months to open its article page.
On the article page, click the 'Save to List' or bookmark button, choose 'Create New List', and enter 'Week 1 Mindfulness' as the list name, then confirm to save the article to that list.

Use the browser back button or the 'Back to Articles' link to return to the filtered list, then for the next 4 articles in order that also show publication dates within the last 12 months, click their bookmark icons directly in the list and select the existing 'Week 1 Mindfulness' list to add each one until you have added a total of 5 articles to that list.

tasks.name: Build a 3-track evening sleep meditation playlist with 12–18 minute sessions rated 4.5+ stars
tasks.description: Create an audio playlist named 'Evening Wind Down' with 3 guided meditations in the Sleep category, each 12–18 minutes long and rated at least 4.5 stars, choosing the three shortest tracks that match these criteria.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Meditations' or 'Audio' section in the main navigation menu.
In the category filters, select the 'Sleep' category to show only sleep-related meditations.
In the duration filter, set the minimum duration to 12 minutes and the maximum duration to 18 minutes using the slider or input fields.
In the rating filter, select '4.5 stars & up' to limit the list to highly rated meditations.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the meditation list and select 'Duration: Shortest First' so that shorter tracks appear first.

Click the 'Add to Playlist' button on the first three meditation cards in the list (top three results), choose 'Create New Playlist' for the first one and name it 'Evening Wind Down', then for the second and third tracks select the existing 'Evening Wind Down' playlist.
After adding the three tracks, click on 'Playlists' or 'My Playlists' in the header or sidebar and then click the 'Evening Wind Down' playlist to open its detail page.

tasks.name: Bookmark the 3 most recent full moon ritual guides into a 'Moon Rituals' collection
tasks.description: Find content about full moon rituals, filter to 'Guides' only, and save the 3 most recently published guides into a collection named 'Moon Rituals'.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header and type "full moon ritual" into the search field.
Press Enter or click the search icon to load the search results page.
On the search results page, locate the 'Content Type' filter and select the 'Guide' checkbox so only guides are shown.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown and select 'Newest First' to have the most recent guides appear at the top.

Click the title of the first guide in the results list to open its page, then click the 'Save' or 'Add to Collection' button and choose 'Create New Collection', entering 'Moon Rituals' as the collection name before confirming.

Use the back button or 'Back to Results' link to return to the search results, then click the 'Save' or bookmark icon directly on the second guide in the list and select the existing 'Moon Rituals' collection.
Repeat the same action for the third guide in the list by clicking its 'Save' or bookmark icon and again selecting the 'Moon Rituals' collection.

tasks.name: Complete a 10-question stress self-assessment quiz and record the result in the journal
tasks.description: Finish the 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)' quiz by selecting the first available answer for each question, then create a journal entry that includes the overall stress level label shown on the results page and the current date in the title.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Quizzes' or 'Assessments' item in the main navigation menu.
On the quizzes page, locate and click the card titled 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)' to open the quiz.
For each of the 10 questions presented, select the first answer option listed before moving on to the next question using the 'Next' or 'Continue' button until the final question is completed.
Click the 'Submit' or 'View Results' button at the end of the quiz to display your stress assessment result and note the overall stress level label shown (for example, 'Low', 'Moderate', or 'High').
From the header menu, click on 'Journal' or 'My Journal' to navigate to the journaling section.
Click the 'New Entry' or '+' button to start a new journal entry, and in the title field type 'Stress Check-in Result - YYYY-MM-DD', replacing 'YYYY-MM-DD' with today’s date in that format.

In the journal body text area, type a short sentence that includes the stress level label from your quiz result, such as 'My overall stress level today is [label] based on the stress check-in quiz.', and then click the 'Save Entry' or 'Save' button.

tasks.name: Register for the next evening 'Breathwork for Anxiety' workshop starting at or after 6:00 PM within the next 30 days
tasks.description: Find an upcoming live workshop titled 'Breathwork for Anxiety' that starts at 6:00 PM or later and occurs within the next 30 days, then complete the on-site reservation form with provided details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the 'Events' or 'Workshops' option in the main navigation menu.
Use the search or filter bar on the events page to type "Breathwork for Anxiety" and apply the search.
In the date range filter, set the start date to today and the end date to 30 days from today using the calendar picker.
In the time-of-day or start time filter, select 'Evening (6 PM – 9 PM)' or choose a minimum start time of 6:00 PM so only evening sessions are shown.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the event list and select 'Soonest Date First' so the next available workshop appears at the top.
Click on the first 'Breathwork for Anxiety' event in the filtered list to open its event detail page, then click the 'Reserve Spot' or 'Register' button.

In the registration form, type 'Test User' in the name field, 'testuser@example.com' in the email field, select your current time zone from the time zone dropdown, and then click the 'Submit Registration' or 'Confirm' button.

tasks.name: Create a 'Morning Self-Compassion' affirmation set with 5 affirmations scheduled for 7:00 AM daily
tasks.description: Select exactly 5 affirmations tagged 'Self-Compassion', save them into a new set called 'Morning Self-Compassion', and schedule that set to appear daily at 7:00 AM using the on-site scheduling controls.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Affirmations' or 'Daily Affirmations' section in the main navigation menu.
In the category or tag filters, select the 'Self-Compassion' tag to limit the list to self-compassion affirmations.
From the filtered affirmations list, click the 'Add to Set' button on the first affirmation card, choose 'Create New Set', and enter 'Morning Self-Compassion' as the set name before confirming.

Click the 'Add to Set' button on the next four affirmation cards in the list and, each time, select the existing 'Morning Self-Compassion' set so that a total of 5 affirmations are included in that set.
In the affirmations section, click on 'My Sets' or 'Manage Sets' to view your saved affirmation sets.
Click the 'Morning Self-Compassion' set to open its details, then click the 'Schedule' or 'Reminder Settings' button.
In the scheduling form, set the time to 7:00 AM using the time picker, choose 'Daily' as the frequency, and click the 'Save Schedule' or 'Apply' button.

tasks.name: Join an easy 3-day digital detox challenge starting next Monday
tasks.description: Locate a 'Digital Detox' challenge with a duration of 3 days and difficulty level 'Easy', then join it and set the start date to the upcoming Monday using the challenge start date picker.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Challenges' or 'Programs' item in the main navigation menu.
In the topic or tag filters, select the 'Digital Detox' tag to show only digital detox-related challenges.
In the duration filter, choose '3 days' from the available duration options.
In the difficulty filter, select 'Easy' to narrow the list to easier challenges.
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the challenge grid and select 'Most Popular' or 'Recommended' to prioritize commonly used options.
Click on the first challenge card that matches these filters to open its challenge detail page, then click the 'Join Challenge' or 'Start Challenge' button.
In the start date field that appears, open the date picker, navigate to the upcoming Monday on the calendar, click that date to select it, and then click the 'Confirm' or 'Start on This Date' button.

tasks.name: Select a higher-rated beginner evening yoga sequence of at least 20 minutes and add it to 'Today’s Practice'
tasks.description: Compare the first two beginner evening yoga sequences that are at least 20 minutes long, identify which has the higher average user rating, and add that one to the 'Today’s Practice' plan.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Practices' or 'Yoga' section in the main navigation menu.
In the difficulty filter, select the 'Beginner' option to show only beginner-friendly sequences.
In the time-of-day or intention filter, select 'Evening' to focus on evening practices.
In the duration filter, set the minimum duration to 20 minutes and leave the maximum at its default or set it to a value higher than 20 minutes (for example, 40 minutes).
Open the 'Sort by' dropdown above the sequence list and choose 'Most Popular' or 'Top Rated' to organize the results in a meaningful order.

Open the first yoga sequence in the list in a new tab and note its average rating value displayed next to the star icon, then open the second sequence in the list in another new tab and note its average rating value.

Determine which of the two sequences has the higher average rating, switch to that sequence’s tab, click the 'Add to Today’s Practice' or 'Add to Today' button, and then click the 'Today’s Practice' link or icon in the header to open the summary of today’s planned practice.

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Written content pieces such as blog posts and guides used in reading lists and search.

fields.name: content_type
fields.description: Used for filters like 'Guides' only in search.

entities.name: ContentCollection
entities.description: Named groups of saved content such as reading lists and article/guide collections.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Distinguishes things called 'reading lists' vs 'collections' in the UI.

entities.name: ContentCollectionItem
entities.description: Join records linking articles/guides into content collections or reading lists.

fields.name: content_entity_type
fields.description: Type of content stored; currently only articles/guides are supported.

entities.name: MeditationTrack
entities.description: Audio meditation tracks used to build playlists.

entities.name: Playlist
entities.description: User-created meditation/audio playlists like 'Evening Wind Down'.

entities.name: PlaylistItem
entities.description: Join records linking meditation tracks into playlists with ordering.

entities.name: Quiz
entities.description: Self-assessment quizzes such as 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)'.

entities.name: QuizQuestion
entities.description: Individual questions belonging to a quiz.

entities.name: QuizAnswerOption
entities.description: Selectable answer options for quiz questions.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Scoring value used to compute results

entities.name: QuizResult
entities.description: Stored results for completed quiz attempts including overall label used in journaling.

entities.name: JournalEntry
entities.description: Personal journal entries, including reflections on quiz results.

entities.name: Event
entities.description: Live events and workshops such as 'Breathwork for Anxiety'.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Array of tag strings (e.g., 'Breathwork for Anxiety')

fields.name: event_timezone
fields.description: Time zone identifier for event times

entities.name: EventRegistration
entities.description: Reservations for events/workshops including registrant details and selected time zone.

entities.name: Affirmation
entities.description: Short affirmation statements that can be grouped into sets and scheduled.

entities.name: AffirmationSet
entities.description: User-defined sets of affirmations like 'Morning Self-Compassion', with optional scheduling.

fields.name: reminder_enabled
fields.description: Whether scheduling/reminders are enabled for this set.

fields.name: schedule_time
fields.description: Time of day for reminders, e.g., '07:00' for 7:00 AM.

entities.name: AffirmationSetItem
entities.description: Join records linking affirmations into sets with ordering.

entities.name: Challenge
entities.description: Multi-day wellness challenges/programs such as a 3-day 'Digital Detox' challenge.

entities.name: ChallengeEnrollment
entities.description: User's participation in a challenge, including chosen start date.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Challenge start date chosen (e.g., upcoming Monday).

entities.name: Practice
entities.description: Yoga sequences and other guided practices used in 'Practices & Yoga' and Today's Practice.

entities.name: TodaysPracticePlan
entities.description: Daily plan for 'Today’s Practice', listing all practices scheduled for a given date.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Represents the day for the plan; time component can be normalized.

entities.name: TodaysPracticeItem
entities.description: Individual practices included in a Today's Practice plan, with order and completion status.
